  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsNet.BasicHttpResponse
    Use JkHttpResponse instead
  • Deprecated Annotation Interfaces
    Annotation Interface
    Description
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkInjectClasspath
    Use @JkDep instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkInjectCompileOption
    Use @JkCompileOption instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkInjectProperty
    Use JkPropValue instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkInjectRunbase
    Use @JkInject instead
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.CREATE_JAR_ACTION
    Use JkProjectPackaging.CREATE_JAR_ACTION instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.DEPENDENCIES_TXT_FILE
    Use JkProject.PROJECT_DEPENDENCIES_FILE instead.
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.packActions
    Use JkProjectPackaging.actions instead;
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.packaging
    Use #pack instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.testing
    Use #test instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProjectTesting.testProcessor
    Use JkProjectTesting.processor instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProjectTesting.testSelection
    Use JkProjectTesting.selection instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.project.ProjectKBean.JkCompilationOptions.javaVersion
    Use ProjectKBean#javaVersion instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.IntellijKBean.suggestedJdkName
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkConstants.CLASSPATH_INJECT_PROP
    dev.jeka.core.tool.JkConstants.DEFAULT_KBEAN_PROP
    Use JkConstants.KBEAN_DEFAULT_PROP instead.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkAbstractPathTree.getRelativeFiles()
    Use JkAbstractPathTree.stream(FileVisitOption...) in combination with JkAbstractPathTree.JkPathTreeStream.relativizeFromRoot() instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathSequence.getEntries()
    Use JkPathSequence.toList() instead.
    dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathSequence.getEntry(int)
    Use JkPathSequence.getElement(int) instead.
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.pack()
    Use JkProjectPackaging.run() instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProject.setJarMaker(Consumer<Path>)
    Use JkProjectPackaging.setJarMaker(Consumer) instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.testing.JkTestProcessor.launch()
    Use #run instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsIterable.listOf(T...)
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsNet.downloadFile(String, Path)
    Use JkHttpRequest.downloadFile(Path) instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsNet.downloadFile(URL, Path, Consumer<HttpURLConnection>)
    Use JkHttpRequest.downloadFile(Path) instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsNet.sendHttpRequest(String, String, String)
    Use JkHttpRequest.execute() instead
    dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsNet.sendHttpRequest(String, String, Map<String, String>, String)
    Use JkHttpRequest.execute() instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.EclipseKBean.files()
    Use EclipseKBean.sync() instead.
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.IntellijKBean.allIml()
    Use IntellijKBean.syncAll() instead.
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.IntellijKBean.configureIml(Consumer<JkIntellijIml>)
    use IntellijKBean.customizeIml(Consumer) instead
    dev.jeka.core.tool.builtins.tooling.ide.IntellijKBean.iml()
    Use IntellijKBean.sync() instead.
